overall.description: A first-person exploration through a surreal, rain-soaked urban environment featuring floating geometric boulders and brutalist architecture. The player moves steadily through flooded streets surrounded by suspended rocks and decaying concrete apartment blocks, creating an atmospheric, dreamlike scene typical of a high-end indie game.

scene_state.functional_zone: flooded brutalist street with floating boulders

agents.ego_description: moving slowly through the flooded street observing the surreal floating rocks and brutalist architecture

entered.detail: tall concrete apartment block with multiple balconies and weathered facade
light-colored concrete building with grid-patterned windows
large geometric rock formation suspended in mid-air
massive floating boulder with rough texture hovering over the street
water-covered asphalt reflecting the sky and surrounding buildings

segments.scene_description: The segment opens with a first-person view moving through a rain-soaked urban canyon. Brutalist concrete apartment blocks line both sides while massive geometric boulders float impossibly in the air. The water-covered street reflects the gray overcast sky and surrounding architecture.

scene_state.functional_zone: flooded street passing large floating rock formation

events.description: passing closely by the massive floating boulder on the right side

agents.ego_description: continuing forward through the flooded street, passing the large floating rock formation on the right

entered.detail: low-rise building with classical architecture and red vertical marking visible in the distance
angular rock formation floating on the right side of the street

segments.scene_description: The camera moves past the first large floating rock formation, revealing more of the flooded street ahead. The building on the right exits the frame while a distant building complex becomes visible in the center. The large central rock moves from the center to the right side as it is passed.

scene_state.functional_zone: open flooded plaza approaching distant structure

events.description: coniferous trees become visible on the right side as the street opens up

agents.ego_description: moving through the more open plaza area toward the distant building complex

entered.detail: cluster of pine trees lining the right side of the flooded area
large rock formation appearing in the center distance

segments.scene_description: The environment opens into a wider flooded plaza with pine trees visible on the right. The camera passes the second large rock formation while the distant building with a red vertical marking grows larger in the center of the frame.

scene_state.functional_zone: approaching destination building with floating rock barriers

events.description: slowing approach toward the final building complex with red marking

agents.ego_description: approaching the destination building, navigating between the final floating rock formations

entered.detail: large angular rock formation floating directly ahead
massive boulder hovering on the right side approaching the destination

segments.scene_description: The final segment shows the approach to the destination building, now clearly visible with its red marking. The original buildings have faded from view, replaced by floating rock barriers and scattered pine trees. The camera moves steadily toward the structure through the shallow flood waters.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person movement through a rain-soaked urban canyon that gradually opens into a wide, flooded plaza. It begins by gliding through a narrow corridor of brutalist concrete apartment blocks where massive geometric boulders float impossibly above a reflective, water-covered street. As the camera passes the first large rock formation, the surrounding buildings recede to reveal a distant architectural complex centered in the frame. The scene then expands into a broader plaza dotted with pine trees, shifting the focus toward a building marked with a distinct red vertical stripe as the camera clears a second floating rock barrier. Finally, the original urban canyon fades entirely from view, leaving the camera to move steadily through shallow floodwaters toward the red-marked destination.
